name: Sleep Reset
description: Flag sessions for a /new-style reset when the user goes idle during their configured sleep window. Uses the core pending-reset flag contract so heartbeats do not keep a stale session alive overnight.

timezone.description: IANA timezone used for the sleep window. Defaults to Asia/Hong_Kong.

windowStartHour.description: Hour (0–23, local time) when the morning flag window opens.

windowEndHour.description: Hour (0–23, local time) when the morning flag window closes. Exclusive upper bound.

minIdleHours.description: Minimum hours since the last real user turn before a session is flagged for reset.

checkIntervalMinutes.description: How often, in minutes, the plugin scans sessions during the window.

agentIds.description: Explicit list of agent ids to scan. Defaults to ["main"].
